svg.title: GrowBot Godot 4 project filesystem layout
svg.desc: Recommended folder and file structure for the GrowBot Godot 4 project, showing scenes, autoloads, assets, and supporting directories
svg.text: — Lumia world data, save/load, age band

g.text: — .gd files not embedded in a scene
— GdUnit4 test suites, one per system

svg.text: gut/ (GdUnit4 test runner, do not hand-edit)
snake_case everywhere · scenes and scripts share names · no spaces in paths
autoload/ = project.godot [autoload] section · .tscn holds node tree, .gd holds logic
